title: Kalshi Sees Rising Institutional Demand for Prediction Markets, Partners with ARK Invest to Launch Research Markets

snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Kalshi Sees Rising Institutional Demand for Prediction Markets, Partners with ARK Invest to Launch Research Markets Tarek Mansour, co-founder and CEO of Kalshi, said that as institutional adoption of prediction markets grows, demand for a standardized market request pi
